<p data-start="857" data-end="880">Contraintes minimales :</p>
<span class="katex-display"><span class="katex"><span class="katex-mathml"><math xmlns="http://www.w3.org/1998/Math/MathML" display="block"><semantics><mrow><mi>r</mi><mi>a</mi><mi>n</mi><mi>k</mi><mo stretchy="false">(</mo><mi>m</mi><mo stretchy="false">)</mo><mo>∈</mo><mi mathvariant="double-struck">N</mi></mrow><annotation encoding="application/x-tex">rank(m)\in \mathbb{N}</annotation></semantics></math></span><span class="katex-html" aria-hidden="true"><span class="base"><span class="strut" style="height: 1em; vertical-align: -0.25em;"></span><span class="mord mathnormal" style="margin-right: 0.02778em;">r</span><span class="mord mathnormal" style="margin-right: 0.03148em;">ank</span><span class="mopen">(</span><span class="mord mathnormal">m</span><span class="mclose">)</span><span class="mspace" style="margin-right: 0.2778em;"></span><span class="mrel">∈</span><span class="mspace" style="margin-right: 0.2778em;"></span></span><span class="base"><span class="strut" style="height: 0.6889em;"></span><span class="mord mathbb">N</span></span></span></span></span>
<span class="katex-display"><span class="katex"><span class="katex-mathml"><math xmlns="http://www.w3.org/1998/Math/MathML" display="block"><semantics><mrow><mi>d</mi><mi>e</mi><mi>p</mi><mi>s</mi><mo stretchy="false">(</mo><mi>m</mi><mo stretchy="false">)</mo><mo>⊂</mo><mi mathvariant="script">M</mi></mrow><annotation encoding="application/x-tex">deps(m)\subset \mathcal{M}</annotation></semantics></math></span><span class="katex-html" aria-hidden="true"><span class="base"><span class="strut" style="height: 1em; vertical-align: -0.25em;"></span><span class="mord mathnormal">d</span><span class="mord mathnormal">e</span><span class="mord mathnormal">p</span><span class="mord mathnormal">s</span><span class="mopen">(</span><span class="mord mathnormal">m</span><span class="mclose">)</span><span class="mspace" style="margin-right: 0.2778em;"></span><span class="mrel">⊂</span><span class="mspace" style="margin-right: 0.2778em;"></span></span><span class="base"><span class="strut" style="height: 0.6833em;"></span><span class="mord mathcal">M</span></span></span></span></span>
<span class="katex-display"><span class="katex"><span class="katex-mathml"><math xmlns="http://www.w3.org/1998/Math/MathML" display="block"><semantics><mrow><mi>p</mi><mi>o</mi><mi>l</mi><mi>i</mi><mi>c</mi><mi>y</mi><mo stretchy="false">(</mo><mi>m</mi><mo stretchy="false">)</mo><mo>∈</mo><mo stretchy="false">{</mo><mtext>hard</mtext><mo separator="true">,</mo><mtext>soft</mtext><mo stretchy="false">}</mo></mrow><annotation encoding="application/x-tex">policy(m)\in \{\text{hard},\text{soft}\}</annotation></semantics></math></span><span class="katex-html" aria-hidden="true"><span class="base"><span class="strut" style="height: 1em; vertical-align: -0.25em;"></span><span class="mord mathnormal">p</span><span class="mord mathnormal">o</span><span class="mord mathnormal" style="margin-right: 0.01968em;">l</span><span class="mord mathnormal">i</span><span class="mord mathnormal" style="margin-right: 0.03588em;">cy</span><span class="mopen">(</span><span class="mord mathnormal">m</span><span class="mclose">)</span><span class="mspace" style="margin-right: 0.2778em;"></span><span class="mrel">∈</span><span class="mspace" style="margin-right: 0.2778em;"></span></span><span class="base"><span class="strut" style="height: 1em; vertical-align: -0.25em;"></span><span class="mopen">{</span><span class="mord text" style=""><span class="mord" style="">hard</span></span><span class="mpunct">,</span><span class="mspace" style="margin-right: 0.1667em;"></span><span class="mord text"><span class="mord">soft</span></span><span class="mclose">}</span></span></span></span></span>
<hr data-start="993" data-end="996">
<h2 data-section-id="ae9mb5" data-start="998" data-end="1050"><span role="text">2) Primitive <code data-start="1014" data-end="1031">HyperConstraint</code> / <code data-start="1034" data-end="1050">MetaDependency</code></span></h2>
<p data-start="1052" data-end="1081">On définit les <strong data-start="1067" data-end="1079">facettes</strong> :</p>
<span class="katex-display"><span class="katex"><span class="katex-mathml"><math xmlns="http://www.w3.org/1998/Math/MathML" display="block"><semantics><mrow><mi>f</mi><mo>:</mo><mo>=</mo><mo stretchy="false">⟨</mo><mi>m</mi><mo separator="true">,</mo><mtext>&nbsp;</mtext><mi>l</mi><mi>a</mi><mi>y</mi><mi>e</mi><mi>r</mi><mo separator="true">,</mo><mtext>&nbsp;</mtext><mi>k</mi><mi>e</mi><mi>y</mi><mo stretchy="false">⟩</mo></mrow><annotation encoding="application/x-tex">f := \langle m,\ layer,\ key \rangle</annotation></semantics></math></span><span class="katex-html" aria-hidden="true"><span class="base"><span class="strut" style="height: 0.8889em; vertical-align: -0.1944em;"></span><span class="mord mathnormal" style="margin-right: 0.10764em;">f</span><span class="mspace" style="margin-right: 0.2778em;"></span><span class="mrel">:=</span><span class="mspace" style="margin-right: 0.2778em;"></span></span><span class="base"><span class="strut" style="height: 1em; vertical-align: -0.25em;"></span><span class="mopen">⟨</span><span class="mord mathnormal">m</span><span class="mpunct">,</span><span class="mspace">&nbsp;</span><span class="mspace" style="margin-right: 0.1667em;"></span><span class="mord mathnormal" style="margin-right: 0.01968em;">l</span><span class="mord mathnormal">a</span><span class="mord mathnormal" style="margin-right: 0.02778em;">yer</span><span class="mpunct">,</span><span class="mspace">&nbsp;</span><span class="mspace" style="margin-right: 0.1667em;"></span><span class="mord mathnormal" style="margin-right: 0.03148em;">k</span><span class="mord mathnormal" style="margin-right: 0.03588em;">ey</span><span class="mclose">⟩</span></span></span></span></span>
<p data-start="1127" data-end="1133">avec :</p>
<span class="katex-display" style=""><span class="katex"><span class="katex-mathml"><math xmlns="http://www.w3.org/1998/Math/MathML" display="block"><semantics><mrow><mi>l</mi><mi>a</mi><mi>y</mi><mi>e</mi><mi>r</mi><mo>∈</mo><mo stretchy="false">{</mo><mi>C</mi><mi>o</mi><mi>r</mi><mi>e</mi><mo separator="true">,</mo><mi>B</mi><mi>e</mi><mi>h</mi><mi>a</mi><mi>v</mi><mi>i</mi><mi>o</mi><mi>r</mi><mo separator="true">,</mo><mi>E</mi><mi>x</mi><mi>e</mi><mi>c</mi><mi>u</mi><mi>t</mi><mi>i</mi><mi>o</mi><mi>n</mi><mo separator="true">,</mo><mi>S</mi><mi>e</mi><mi>m</mi><mi>a</mi><mi>n</mi><mi>t</mi><mi>i</mi><mi>c</mi><mi>s</mi><mo stretchy="false">}</mo></mrow><annotation encoding="application/x-tex">layer \in \{Core,Behavior,Execution,Semantics\}</annotation></semantics></math></span><span class="katex-html" aria-hidden="true"><span class="base"><span class="strut" style="height: 0.8889em; vertical-align: -0.1944em;"></span><span class="mord mathnormal" style="margin-right: 0.01968em;">l</span><span class="mord mathnormal">a</span><span class="mord mathnormal" style="margin-right: 0.02778em;">yer</span><span class="mspace" style="margin-right: 0.2778em;"></span><span class="mrel">∈</span><span class="mspace" style="margin-right: 0.2778em;"></span></span><span class="base"><span class="strut" style="height: 1em; vertical-align: -0.25em;"></span><span class="mopen">{</span><span class="mord mathnormal" style="margin-right: 0.07153em;">C</span><span class="mord mathnormal">ore</span><span class="mpunct">,</span><span class="mspace" style="margin-right: 0.1667em;"></span><span class="mord mathnormal" style="margin-right: 0.05017em;">B</span><span class="mord mathnormal">e</span><span class="mord mathnormal">ha</span><span class="mord mathnormal" style="margin-right: 0.03588em;">v</span><span class="mord mathnormal">i</span><span class="mord mathnormal" style="margin-right: 0.02778em;">or</span><span class="mpunct">,</span><span class="mspace" style="margin-right: 0.1667em;"></span><span class="mord mathnormal" style="margin-right: 0.05764em;">E</span><span class="mord mathnormal">x</span><span class="mord mathnormal">ec</span><span class="mord mathnormal">u</span><span class="mord mathnormal">t</span><span class="mord mathnormal">i</span><span class="mord mathnormal">o</span><span class="mord mathnormal">n</span><span class="mpunct">,</span><span class="mspace" style="margin-right: 0.1667em;"></span><span class="mord mathnormal" style="margin-right: 0.05764em;">S</span><span class="mord mathnormal">e</span><span class="mord mathnormal">man</span><span class="mord mathnormal">t</span><span class="mord mathnormal">i</span><span class="mord mathnormal">cs</span><span class="mclose">}</span></span></span></span></span>
<p data-start="1190" data-end="1223">Une hyperarête de cohérence est :</p>
<span class="katex-display"><span class="katex"><span class="katex-mathml"><math xmlns="http://www.w3.org/1998/Math/MathML" display="block"><semantics><mrow><mi>χ</mi><mo>:</mo><mo>=</mo><mo stretchy="false">⟨</mo><mi>P</mi><mo separator="true">,</mo><mtext>&nbsp;</mtext><mi>t</mi><mo separator="true">,</mo><mtext>&nbsp;</mtext><mi>k</mi><mi>i</mi><mi>n</mi><mi>d</mi><mo separator="true">,</mo><mtext>&nbsp;</mtext><mi>φ</mi><mo separator="true">,</mo><mtext>&nbsp;</mtext><mi>a</mi><mi>u</mi><mi>t</mi><mi>h</mi><mi>o</mi><mi>r</mi><mi>i</mi><mi>t</mi><mi>y</mi><mo separator="true">,</mo><mtext>&nbsp;</mtext><mi>s</mi><mi>e</mi><mi>v</mi><mi>e</mi><mi>r</mi><mi>i</mi><mi>t</mi><mi>y</mi><mo stretchy="false">⟩</mo></mrow><annotation encoding="application/x-tex">\chi := \langle P,\ t,\ kind,\ \varphi,\ authority,\ severity \rangle</annotation></semantics></math></span><span class="katex-html" aria-hidden="true"><span class="base"><span class="strut" style="height: 0.625em; vertical-align: -0.1944em;"></span><span class="mord mathnormal">χ</span><span class="mspace" style="margin-right: 0.2778em;"></span><span class="mrel">:=</span><span class="mspace" style="margin-right: 0.2778em;"></span></span><span class="base"><span class="strut" style="height: 1em; vertical-align: -0.25em;"></span><span class="mopen">⟨</span><span class="mord mathnormal" style="margin-right: 0.13889em;">P</span><span class="mpunct">,</span><span class="mspace">&nbsp;</span><span class="mspace" style="margin-right: 0.1667em;"></span><span class="mord mathnormal">t</span><span class="mpunct">,</span><span class="mspace">&nbsp;</span><span class="mspace" style="margin-right: 0.1667em;"></span><span class="mord mathnormal">kin</span><span class="mord mathnormal">d</span><span class="mpunct">,</span><span class="mspace">&nbsp;</span><span class="mspace" style="margin-right: 0.1667em;"></span><span class="mord mathnormal">φ</span><span class="mpunct">,</span><span class="mspace">&nbsp;</span><span class="mspace" style="margin-right: 0.1667em;"></span><span class="mord mathnormal">a</span><span class="mord mathnormal">u</span><span class="mord mathnormal">t</span><span class="mord mathnormal">h</span><span class="mord mathnormal" style="margin-right: 0.02778em;">or</span><span class="mord mathnormal">i</span><span class="mord mathnormal">t</span><span class="mord mathnormal" style="margin-right: 0.03588em;">y</span><span class="mpunct">,</span><span class="mspace">&nbsp;</span><span class="mspace" style="margin-right: 0.1667em;"></span><span class="mord mathnormal">se</span><span class="mord mathnormal" style="margin-right: 0.03588em;">v</span><span class="mord mathnormal" style="margin-right: 0.02778em;">er</span><span class="mord mathnormal">i</span><span class="mord mathnormal">t</span><span class="mord mathnormal" style="margin-right: 0.03588em;">y</span><span class="mclose">⟩</span></span></span></span></span>
<p data-start="1302" data-end="1306">où :</p>
<ul data-start="1308" data-end="1693">
<li data-section-id="a32ig6" data-start="1308" data-end="1368">
<p data-start="1310" data-end="1368"><span class="katex"><span class="katex-mathml"><math xmlns="http://www.w3.org/1998/Math/MathML"><semantics><mrow><mi>P</mi><mo>⊂</mo><mi>F</mi></mrow><annotation encoding="application/x-tex">P \subset F</annotation></semantics></math></span><span class="katex-html" aria-hidden="true"><span class="base"><span class="strut" style="height: 0.7224em; vertical-align: -0.0391em;"></span><span class="mord mathnormal" style="margin-right: 0.13889em;">P</span><span class="mspace" style="margin-right: 0.2778em;"></span><span class="mrel">⊂</span><span class="mspace" style="margin-right: 0.2778em;"></span></span><span class="base"><span class="strut" style="height: 0.6833em;"></span><span class="mord mathnormal" style="margin-right: 0.13889em;">F</span></span></span></span> est un ensemble fini non vide de prémisses</p>
</li>
<li data-section-id="17uv30u" data-start="1369" data-end="1395">
<p data-start="1371" data-end="1395"><span class="katex"><span class="katex-mathml"><math xmlns="http://www.w3.org/1998/Math/MathML"><semantics><mrow><mi>t</mi><mo>∈</mo><mi>F</mi></mrow><annotation encoding="application/x-tex">t \in F</annotation></semantics></math></span><span class="katex-html" aria-hidden="true"><span class="base"><span class="strut" style="height: 0.6542em; vertical-align: -0.0391em;"></span><span class="mord mathnormal">t</span><span class="mspace" style="margin-right: 0.2778em;"></span><span class="mrel">∈</span><span class="mspace" style="margin-right: 0.2778em;"></span></span><span class="base"><span class="strut" style="height: 0.6833em;"></span><span class="mord mathnormal" style="margin-right: 0.13889em;">F</span></span></span></span> est la cible</p>
</li>
<li data-section-id="19fdus3" data-start="1396" data-end="1514">
<p data-start="1398" data-end="1514"><span class="katex"><span class="katex-mathml"><math xmlns="http://www.w3.org/1998/Math/MathML"><semantics><mrow><mi>k</mi><mi>i</mi><mi>n</mi><mi>d</mi><mo>∈</mo><mo stretchy="false">{</mo><mtext>coherence</mtext><mo separator="true">,</mo><mtext>dependency</mtext><mo separator="true">,</mo><mtext>ordering</mtext><mo separator="true">,</mo><mtext>resource</mtext><mo separator="true">,</mo><mtext>exclusion</mtext><mo separator="true">,</mo><mtext>semantic</mtext><mo stretchy="false">}</mo></mrow><annotation encoding="application/x-tex">kind \in \{\text{coherence},\text{dependency},\text{ordering},\text{resource},\text{exclusion},\text{semantic}\}</annotation></semantics></math></span><span class="katex-html" aria-hidden="true"><span class="base"><span class="strut" style="height: 0.7335em; vertical-align: -0.0391em;"></span><span class="mord mathnormal">kin</span><span class="mord mathnormal">d</span><span class="mspace" style="margin-right: 0.2778em;"></span><span class="mrel">∈</span><span class="mspace" style="margin-right: 0.2778em;"></span></span><span class="base"><span class="strut" style="height: 1em; vertical-align: -0.25em;"></span><span class="mopen">{</span><span class="mord text"><span class="mord">coherence</span></span><span class="mpunct">,</span><span class="mspace" style="margin-right: 0.1667em;"></span><span class="mord text"><span class="mord">dependency</span></span><span class="mpunct">,</span><span class="mspace" style="margin-right: 0.1667em;"></span><span class="mord text"><span class="mord">ordering</span></span><span class="mpunct">,</span><span class="mspace" style="margin-right: 0.1667em;"></span><span class="mord text"><span class="mord">resource</span></span><span class="mpunct">,</span><span class="mspace" style="margin-right: 0.1667em;"></span><span class="mord text"><span class="mord">exclusion</span></span><span class="mpunct">,</span><span class="mspace" style="margin-right: 0.1667em;"></span><span class="mord text"><span class="mord">semantic</span></span><span class="mclose">}</span></span></span></span></p>
</li>
<li data-section-id="w9rg0p" data-start="1515" data-end="1560">
<p data-start="1517" data-end="1560"><span class="katex"><span class="katex-mathml"><math xmlns="http://www.w3.org/1998/Math/MathML"><semantics><mrow><mi>φ</mi><mo>:</mo><mi>S</mi><mi>t</mi><mi>a</mi><mi>t</mi><mi>e</mi><mo stretchy="false">(</mo><mi>P</mi><mo>∪</mo><mo stretchy="false">{</mo><mi>t</mi><mo stretchy="false">}</mo><mo stretchy="false">)</mo><mo>→</mo><mo stretchy="false">{</mo><mn>0</mn><mo separator="true">,</mo><mn>1</mn><mo stretchy="false">}</mo></mrow><annotation encoding="application/x-tex">\varphi : State(P\cup\{t\}) \to \{0,1\}</annotation></semantics></math></span><span class="katex-html" aria-hidden="true"><span class="base"><span class="strut" style="height: 0.625em; vertical-align: -0.1944em;"></span><span class="mord mathnormal">φ</span><span class="mspace" style="margin-right: 0.2778em;"></span><span class="mrel">:</span><span class="mspace" style="margin-right: 0.2778em;"></span></span><span class="base"><span class="strut" style="height: 1em; vertical-align: -0.25em;"></span><span class="mord mathnormal">St</span><span class="mord mathnormal">a</span><span class="mord mathnormal">t</span><span class="mord mathnormal">e</span><span class="mopen">(</span><span class="mord mathnormal" style="margin-right: 0.13889em;">P</span><span class="mspace" style="margin-right: 0.2222em;"></span><span class="mbin">∪</span><span class="mspace" style="margin-right: 0.2222em;"></span></span><span class="base"><span class="strut" style="height: 1em; vertical-align: -0.25em;"></span><span class="mopen">{</span><span class="mord mathnormal">t</span><span class="mclose">})</span><span class="mspace" style="margin-right: 0.2778em;"></span><span class="mrel">→</span><span class="mspace" style="margin-right: 0.2778em;"></span></span><span class="base"><span class="strut" style="height: 1em; vertical-align: -0.25em;"></span><span class="mopen">{</span><span class="mord">0</span><span class="mpunct">,</span><span class="mspace" style="margin-right: 0.1667em;"></span><span class="mord">1</span><span class="mclose">}</span></span></span></span></p>
</li>
<li data-section-id="k2l3b4" data-start="1561" data-end="1646">
<p data-start="1563" data-end="1646"><span class="katex"><span class="katex-mathml"><math xmlns="http://www.w3.org/1998/Math/MathML"><semantics><mrow><mi>a</mi><mi>u</mi><mi>t</mi><mi>h</mi><mi>o</mi><mi>r</mi><mi>i</mi><mi>t</mi><mi>y</mi><mo>∈</mo><mo stretchy="false">{</mo><mtext>external</mtext><mo separator="true">,</mo><mtext>bootstrap</mtext><mo separator="true">,</mo><mtext>module</mtext><mo separator="true">,</mo><mtext>runtime</mtext><mo stretchy="false">}</mo></mrow><annotation encoding="application/x-tex">authority \in \{\text{external},\text{bootstrap},\text{module},\text{runtime}\}</annotation></semantics></math></span><span class="katex-html" aria-hidden="true"><span class="base"><span class="strut" style="height: 0.8889em; vertical-align: -0.1944em;"></span><span class="mord mathnormal">a</span><span class="mord mathnormal">u</span><span class="mord mathnormal">t</span><span class="mord mathnormal">h</span><span class="mord mathnormal" style="margin-right: 0.02778em;">or</span><span class="mord mathnormal">i</span><span class="mord mathnormal">t</span><span class="mord mathnormal" style="margin-right: 0.03588em;">y</span><span class="mspace" style="margin-right: 0.2778em;"></span><span class="mrel">∈</span><span class="mspace" style="margin-right: 0.2778em;"></span></span><span class="base"><span class="strut" style="height: 1em; vertical-align: -0.25em;"></span><span class="mopen">{</span><span class="mord text"><span class="mord">external</span></span><span class="mpunct">,</span><span class="mspace" style="margin-right: 0.1667em;"></span><span class="mord text"><span class="mord">bootstrap</span></span><span class="mpunct">,</span><span class="mspace" style="margin-right: 0.1667em;"></span><span class="mord text"><span class="mord">module</span></span><span class="mpunct">,</span><span class="mspace" style="margin-right: 0.1667em;"></span><span class="mord text"><span class="mord">runtime</span></span><span class="mclose">}</span></span></span></span></p>
</li>
<li data-section-id="1raw1mi" data-start="1647" data-end="1693">
<p data-start="1649" data-end="1693"><span class="katex"><span class="katex-mathml"><math xmlns="http://www.w3.org/1998/Math/MathML"><semantics><mrow><mi>s</mi><mi>e</mi><mi>v</mi><mi>e</mi><mi>r</mi><mi>i</mi><mi>t</mi><mi>y</mi><mo>∈</mo><mo stretchy="false">{</mo><mtext>hard</mtext><mo separator="true">,</mo><mtext>soft</mtext><mo stretchy="false">}</mo></mrow><annotation encoding="application/x-tex">severity \in \{\text{hard},\text{soft}\}</annotation></semantics></math></span><span class="katex-html" aria-hidden="true"><span class="base"><span class="strut" style="height: 0.854em; vertical-align: -0.1944em;"></span><span class="mord mathnormal">se</span><span class="mord mathnormal" style="margin-right: 0.03588em;">v</span><span class="mord mathnormal" style="margin-right: 0.02778em;">er</span><span class="mord mathnormal">i</span><span class="mord mathnormal">t</span><span class="mord mathnormal" style="margin-right: 0.03588em;">y</span><span class="mspace" style="margin-right: 0.2778em;"></span><span class="mrel">∈</span><span class="mspace" style="margin-right: 0.2778em;"></span></span><span class="base"><span class="strut" style="height: 1em; vertical-align: -0.25em;"></span><span class="mopen">{</span><span class="mord text"><span class="mord">hard</span></span><span class="mpunct">,</span><span class="mspace" style="margin-right: 0.1667em;"></span><span class="mord text"><span class="mord">soft</span></span><span class="mclose">}</span></span></span></span></p>
</li>
</ul>
<p data-start="1695" data-end="1709">Satisfaction :</p>
<span class="katex-display" style=""><span class="katex"><span class="katex-mathml"><math xmlns="http://www.w3.org/1998/Math/MathML" display="block"><semantics><mrow><mi>S</mi><mi>a</mi><mi>t</mi><mo stretchy="false">(</mo><mi>χ</mi><mo stretchy="false">)</mo><mtext>  </mtext><mo>⟺</mo><mtext>  </mtext><mi>φ</mi><mo stretchy="false">(</mo><mi>σ</mi><msub><mi mathvariant="normal">∣</mi><mrow><mi>P</mi><mo>∪</mo><mo stretchy="false">{</mo><mi>t</mi><mo stretchy="false">}</mo></mrow></msub><mo stretchy="false">)</mo><mo>=</mo><mn>1</mn></mrow><annotation encoding="application/x-tex">Sat(\chi)\iff \varphi(\sigma|_{P\cup\{t\}})=1</annotation></semantics></math></span><span class="katex-html" aria-hidden="true"><span class="base"><span class="strut" style="height: 1em; vertical-align: -0.25em;"></span><span class="mord mathnormal" style="margin-right: 0.05764em;">S</span><span class="mord mathnormal">a</span><span class="mord mathnormal">t</span><span class="mopen">(</span><span class="mord mathnormal">χ</span><span class="mclose">)</span><span class="mspace" style="margin-right: 0.2778em;"></span><span class="mspace" style="margin-right: 0.2778em;"></span><span class="mrel">⟺</span><span class="mspace" style="margin-right: 0.2778em;"></span><span class="mspace" style="margin-right: 0.2778em;"></span></span><span class="base"><span class="strut" style="height: 1.1052em; vertical-align: -0.3552em;"></span><span class="mord mathnormal">φ</span><span class="mopen">(</span><span class="mord mathnormal" style="margin-right: 0.03588em;">σ</span><span class="mord"><span class="mord">∣</span><span class="msupsub"><span class="vlist-t vlist-t2"><span class="vlist-r"><span class="vlist" style="height: 0.3448em;"><span style="top: -2.5198em; margin-left: 0em; margin-right: 0.05em;"><span class="pstrut" style="height: 2.7em;"></span><span class="sizing reset-size6 size3 mtight"><span class="mord mtight"><span class="mord mathnormal mtight" style="margin-right: 0.13889em;">P</span><span class="mbin mtight">∪</span><span class="mopen mtight">{</span><span class="mord mathnormal mtight">t</span><span class="mclose mtight">}</span></span></span></span></span><span class="vlist-s">​</span></span><span class="vlist-r"><span class="vlist" style="height: 0.3552em;"><span></span></span></span></span></span></span><span class="mclose">)</span><span class="mspace" style="margin-right: 0.2778em;"></span><span class="mrel">=</span><span class="mspace" style="margin-right: 0.2778em;"></span></span><span class="base"><span class="strut" style="height: 0.6444em;"></span><span class="mord">1</span></span></span></span></span>
<hr data-start="1764" data-end="1767">
<h2 data-section-id="18bv0xo" data-start="1769" data-end="1795">3) Graphe de validation</h2>
<p data-start="1797" data-end="1833">On définit le graphe de validation :</p>
<span class="katex-display" style=""><span class="katex"><span class="katex-mathml"><math xmlns="http://www.w3.org/1998/Math/MathML" display="block"><semantics><mrow><msub><mi>G</mi><mi>v</mi></msub><mo>=</mo><mo stretchy="false">(</mo><mi>F</mi><mo separator="true">,</mo><msub><mi>E</mi><mi>v</mi></msub><mo stretchy="false">)</mo></mrow><annotation encoding="application/x-tex">G_v=(F,E_v)</annotation></semantics></math></span><span class="katex-html" aria-hidden="true"><span class="base"><span class="strut" style="height: 0.8333em; vertical-align: -0.15em;"></span><span class="mord"><span class="mord mathnormal">G</span><span class="msupsub"><span class="vlist-t vlist-t2"><span class="vlist-r"><span class="vlist" style="height: 0.1514em;"><span style="top: -2.55em; margin-left: 0em; margin-right: 0.05em;"><span class="pstrut" style="height: 2.7em;"></span><span class="sizing reset-size6 size3 mtight"><span class="mord mathnormal mtight" style="margin-right: 0.03588em;">v</span></span></span></span><span class="vlist-s">​</span></span><span class="vlist-r"><span class="vlist" style="height: 0.15em;"><span></span></span></span></span></span></span><span class="mspace" style="margin-right: 0.2778em;"></span><span class="mrel">=</span><span class="mspace" style="margin-right: 0.2778em;"></span></span><span class="base"><span class="strut" style="height: 1em; vertical-align: -0.25em;"></span><span class="mopen">(</span><span class="mord mathnormal" style="margin-right: 0.13889em;">F</span><span class="mpunct">,</span><span class="mspace" style="margin-right: 0.1667em;"></span><span class="mord"><span class="mord mathnormal" style="margin-right: 0.05764em;">E</span><span class="msupsub"><span class="vlist-t vlist-t2"><span class="vlist-r"><span class="vlist" style="height: 0.1514em;"><span style="top: -2.55em; margin-left: -0.0576em; margin-right: 0.05em;"><span class="pstrut" style="height: 2.7em;"></span><span class="sizing reset-size6 size3 mtight"><span class="mord mathnormal mtight" style="margin-right: 0.03588em;">v</span></span></span></span><span class="vlist-s">​</span></span><span class="vlist-r"><span class="vlist" style="height: 0.15em;"><span></span></span></span></span></span></span><span class="mclose">)</span></span></span></span></span>
<p data-start="1854" data-end="1860">avec :</p>
<span class="katex-display"><span class="katex"><span class="katex-mathml"><math xmlns="http://www.w3.org/1998/Math/MathML" display="block"><semantics><mrow><mo stretchy="false">(</mo><mi>u</mi><mo>→</mo><mi>v</mi><mo stretchy="false">)</mo><mo>∈</mo><msub><mi>E</mi><mi>v</mi></msub><mtext>  </mtext><mo>⟹</mo><mtext>  </mtext><mi>r</mi><mi>a</mi><mi>n</mi><mi>k</mi><mo stretchy="false">(</mo><mi>u</mi><mo stretchy="false">)</mo><mo>&lt;</mo><mi>r</mi><mi>a</mi><mi>n</mi><mi>k</mi><mo stretchy="false">(</mo><mi>v</mi><mo stretchy="false">)</mo></mrow><annotation encoding="application/x-tex">(u\to v)\in E_v \implies rank(u)&lt;rank(v)</annotation></semantics></math></span><span class="katex-html" aria-hidden="true"><span class="base"><span class="strut" style="height: 1em; vertical-align: -0.25em;"></span><span class="mopen">(</span><span class="mord mathnormal">u</span><span class="mspace" style="margin-right: 0.2778em;"></span><span class="mrel">→</span><span class="mspace" style="margin-right: 0.2778em;"></span></span><span class="base"><span class="strut" style="height: 1em; vertical-align: -0.25em;"></span><span class="mord mathnormal" style="margin-right: 0.03588em;">v</span><span class="mclose">)</span><span class="mspace" style="margin-right: 0.2778em;"></span><span class="mrel">∈</span><span class="mspace" style="margin-right: 0.2778em;"></span></span><span class="base"><span class="strut" style="height: 0.8333em; vertical-align: -0.15em;"></span><span class="mord"><span class="mord mathnormal" style="margin-right: 0.05764em;">E</span><span class="msupsub"><span class="vlist-t vlist-t2"><span class="vlist-r"><span class="vlist" style="height: 0.1514em;"><span style="top: -2.55em; margin-left: -0.0576em; margin-right: 0.05em;"><span class="pstrut" style="height: 2.7em;"></span><span class="sizing reset-size6 size3 mtight"><span class="mord mathnormal mtight" style="margin-right: 0.03588em;">v</span></span></span></span><span class="vlist-s">​</span></span><span class="vlist-r"><span class="vlist" style="height: 0.15em;"><span></span></span></span></span></span></span><span class="mspace" style="margin-right: 0.2778em;"></span><span class="mspace" style="margin-right: 0.2778em;"></span><span class="mrel">⟹</span><span class="mspace" style="margin-right: 0.2778em;"></span><span class="mspace" style="margin-right: 0.2778em;"></span></span><span class="base"><span class="strut" style="height: 1em; vertical-align: -0.25em;"></span><span class="mord mathnormal" style="margin-right: 0.02778em;">r</span><span class="mord mathnormal" style="margin-right: 0.03148em;">ank</span><span class="mopen">(</span><span class="mord mathnormal">u</span><span class="mclose">)</span><span class="mspace" style="margin-right: 0.2778em;"></span><span class="mrel">&lt;</span><span class="mspace" style="margin-right: 0.2778em;"></span></span><span class="base"><span class="strut" style="height: 1em; vertical-align: -0.25em;"></span><span class="mord mathnormal" style="margin-right: 0.02778em;">r</span><span class="mord mathnormal" style="margin-right: 0.03148em;">ank</span><span class="mopen">(</span><span class="mord mathnormal" style="margin-right: 0.03588em;">v</span><span class="mclose">)</span></span></span></span></span>
<p data-start="1910" data-end="1942">et pour chaque hypercontrainte :</p>
<span class="katex-display"><span class="katex"><span class="katex-mathml"><math xmlns="http://www.w3.org/1998/Math/MathML" display="block"><semantics><mrow><mi>χ</mi><mo>=</mo><mo stretchy="false">⟨</mo><mi>P</mi><mo separator="true">,</mo><mi>t</mi><mo separator="true">,</mo><mo>…</mo><mtext> </mtext><mo stretchy="false">⟩</mo><mtext>  </mtext><mo>⟹</mo><mtext>  </mtext><mi mathvariant="normal">∀</mi><mi>p</mi><mo>∈</mo><mi>P</mi><mo separator="true">,</mo><mtext>&nbsp;</mtext><mi>r</mi><mi>a</mi><mi>n</mi><mi>k</mi><mo stretchy="false">(</mo><mi>p</mi><mo stretchy="false">)</mo><mo>&lt;</mo><mi>r</mi><mi>a</mi><mi>n</mi><mi>k</mi><mo stretchy="false">(</mo><mi>t</mi><mo stretchy="false">)</mo></mrow><annotation encoding="application/x-tex">\chi=\langle P,t,\dots\rangle \implies \forall p\in P,\ rank(p)&lt;rank(t)</annotation></semantics></math></span><span class="katex-html" aria-hidden="true"><span class="base"><span class="strut" style="height: 0.625em; vertical-align: -0.1944em;"></span><span class="mord mathnormal">χ</span><span class="mspace" style="margin-right: 0.2778em;"></span><span class="mrel">=</span><span class="mspace" style="margin-right: 0.2778em;"></span></span><span class="base"><span class="strut" style="height: 1em; vertical-align: -0.25em;"></span><span class="mopen">⟨</span><span class="mord mathnormal" style="margin-right: 0.13889em;">P</span><span class="mpunct">,</span><span class="mspace" style="margin-right: 0.1667em;"></span><span class="mord mathnormal">t</span><span class="mpunct">,</span><span class="mspace" style="margin-right: 0.1667em;"></span><span class="minner">…</span><span class="mspace" style="margin-right: 0.1667em;"></span><span class="mclose">⟩</span><span class="mspace" style="margin-right: 0.2778em;"></span><span class="mspace" style="margin-right: 0.2778em;"></span><span class="mrel">⟹</span><span class="mspace" style="margin-right: 0.2778em;"></span><span class="mspace" style="margin-right: 0.2778em;"></span></span><span class="base"><span class="strut" style="height: 0.8889em; vertical-align: -0.1944em;"></span><span class="mord">∀</span><span class="mord mathnormal">p</span><span class="mspace" style="margin-right: 0.2778em;"></span><span class="mrel">∈</span><span class="mspace" style="margin-right: 0.2778em;"></span></span><span class="base"><span class="strut" style="height: 1em; vertical-align: -0.25em;"></span><span class="mord mathnormal" style="margin-right: 0.13889em;">P</span><span class="mpunct">,</span><span class="mspace">&nbsp;</span><span class="mspace" style="margin-right: 0.1667em;"></span><span class="mord mathnormal" style="margin-right: 0.02778em;">r</span><span class="mord mathnormal" style="margin-right: 0.03148em;">ank</span><span class="mopen">(</span><span class="mord mathnormal">p</span><span class="mclose">)</span><span class="mspace" style="margin-right: 0.2778em;"></span><span class="mrel">&lt;</span><span class="mspace" style="margin-right: 0.2778em;"></span></span><span class="base"><span class="strut" style="height: 1em; vertical-align: -0.25em;"></span><span class="mord mathnormal" style="margin-right: 0.02778em;">r</span><span class="mord mathnormal" style="margin-right: 0.03148em;">ank</span><span class="mopen">(</span><span class="mord mathnormal">t</span><span class="mclose">)</span></span></span></span></span>
<hr data-start="2023" data-end="2026">
<h2 data-section-id="1tvpasa" data-start="2028" data-end="2047">4) Bootstrapping</h2>
<p data-start="2049" data-end="2078">Définition du noyau minimal :</p>
<span class="katex-display"><span class="katex"><span class="katex-mathml"><math xmlns="http://www.w3.org/1998/Math/MathML" display="block"><semantics><mrow><mi>B</mi><mi>o</mi><mi>o</mi><mi>t</mi><mi>s</mi><mi>t</mi><mi>r</mi><mi>a</mi><mi>p</mi><mi>C</mi><mi>o</mi><mi>r</mi><mi>e</mi><mo>:</mo><mo>=</mo><mi>b</mi><mo>∈</mo><mi mathvariant="script">M</mi></mrow><annotation encoding="application/x-tex">BootstrapCore := b \in \mathcal{M}</annotation></semantics></math></span><span class="katex-html" aria-hidden="true"><span class="base"><span class="strut" style="height: 0.8778em; vertical-align: -0.1944em;"></span><span class="mord mathnormal" style="margin-right: 0.05017em;">B</span><span class="mord mathnormal">oo</span><span class="mord mathnormal">t</span><span class="mord mathnormal">s</span><span class="mord mathnormal">t</span><span class="mord mathnormal" style="margin-right: 0.02778em;">r</span><span class="mord mathnormal">a</span><span class="mord mathnormal" style="margin-right: 0.07153em;">pC</span><span class="mord mathnormal">ore</span><span class="mspace" style="margin-right: 0.2778em;"></span><span class="mrel">:=</span><span class="mspace" style="margin-right: 0.2778em;"></span></span><span class="base"><span class="strut" style="height: 0.7335em; vertical-align: -0.0391em;"></span><span class="mord mathnormal">b</span><span class="mspace" style="margin-right: 0.2778em;"></span><span class="mrel">∈</span><span class="mspace" style="margin-right: 0.2778em;"></span></span><span class="base"><span class="strut" style="height: 0.6833em;"></span><span class="mord mathcal">M</span></span></span></span></span>
<p data-start="2122" data-end="2131">Axiomes :</p>
<span class="katex-display"><span class="katex"><span class="katex-mathml"><math xmlns="http://www.w3.org/1998/Math/MathML" display="block"><semantics><mrow><mi>r</mi><mi>a</mi><mi>n</mi><mi>k</mi><mo stretchy="false">(</mo><mi>b</mi><mo stretchy="false">)</mo><mo>=</mo><mn>0</mn></mrow><annotation encoding="application/x-tex">rank(b)=0</annotation></semantics></math></span><span class="katex-html" aria-hidden="true"><span class="base"><span class="strut" style="height: 1em; vertical-align: -0.25em;"></span><span class="mord mathnormal" style="margin-right: 0.02778em;">r</span><span class="mord mathnormal" style="margin-right: 0.03148em;">ank</span><span class="mopen">(</span><span class="mord mathnormal">b</span><span class="mclose">)</span><span class="mspace" style="margin-right: 0.2778em;"></span><span class="mrel">=</span><span class="mspace" style="margin-right: 0.2778em;"></span></span><span class="base"><span class="strut" style="height: 0.6444em;"></span><span class="mord">0</span></span></span></span></span>
<span class="katex-display"><span class="katex"><span class="katex-mathml"><math xmlns="http://www.w3.org/1998/Math/MathML" display="block"><semantics><mrow><mi>d</mi><mi>e</mi><mi>p</mi><mi>s</mi><mo stretchy="false">(</mo><mi>b</mi><mo stretchy="false">)</mo><mo>=</mo><mi mathvariant="normal">∅</mi></mrow><annotation encoding="application/x-tex">deps(b)=\varnothing</annotation></semantics></math></span><span class="katex-html" aria-hidden="true"><span class="base"><span class="strut" style="height: 1em; vertical-align: -0.25em;"></span><span class="mord mathnormal">d</span><span class="mord mathnormal">e</span><span class="mord mathnormal">p</span><span class="mord mathnormal">s</span><span class="mopen">(</span><span class="mord mathnormal">b</span><span class="mclose">)</span><span class="mspace" style="margin-right: 0.2778em;"></span><span class="mrel">=</span><span class="mspace" style="margin-right: 0.2778em;"></span></span><span class="base"><span class="strut" style="height: 0.6633em; vertical-align: -0.0817em;"></span><span class="mord amsrm">∅</span></span></span></span></span>
<span class="katex-display"><span class="katex"><span class="katex-mathml"><math xmlns="http://www.w3.org/1998/Math/MathML" display="block"><semantics><mrow><msub><mi>V</mi><mrow><mi>e</mi><mi>x</mi><mi>t</mi></mrow></msub><mo>⊢</mo><mi>W</mi><mi>F</mi><mo stretchy="false">(</mo><mi>b</mi><mo stretchy="false">)</mo></mrow><annotation encoding="application/x-tex">V_{ext}\vdash WF(b)</annotation></semantics></math></span><span class="katex-html" aria-hidden="true"><span class="base"><span class="strut" style="height: 0.8444em; vertical-align: -0.15em;"></span><span class="mord"><span class="mord mathnormal" style="margin-right: 0.22222em;">V</span><span class="msupsub"><span class="vlist-t vlist-t2"><span class="vlist-r"><span class="vlist" style="height: 0.2806em;"><span style="top: -2.55em; margin-left: -0.2222em; margin-right: 0.05em;"><span class="pstrut" style="height: 2.7em;"></span><span class="sizing reset-size6 size3 mtight"><span class="mord mtight"><span class="mord mathnormal mtight">e</span><span class="mord mathnormal mtight">x</span><span class="mord mathnormal mtight">t</span></span></span></span></span><span class="vlist-s">​</span></span><span class="vlist-r"><span class="vlist" style="height: 0.15em;"><span></span></span></span></span></span></span><span class="mspace" style="margin-right: 0.2778em;"></span><span class="mrel">⊢</span><span class="mspace" style="margin-right: 0.2778em;"></span></span><span class="base"><span class="strut" style="height: 1em; vertical-align: -0.25em;"></span><span class="mord mathnormal" style="margin-right: 0.13889em;">W</span><span class="mord mathnormal" style="margin-right: 0.13889em;">F</span><span class="mopen">(</span><span class="mord mathnormal">b</span><span class="mclose">)</span></span></span></span></span>
<span class="katex-display"><span class="katex"><span class="katex-mathml"><math xmlns="http://www.w3.org/1998/Math/MathML" display="block"><semantics><mrow><mi mathvariant="normal">∀</mi><mi>m</mi><mo>∈</mo><mi mathvariant="script">M</mi><mo>∖</mo><mo stretchy="false">{</mo><mi>b</mi><mo stretchy="false">}</mo><mo separator="true">,</mo><mtext>&nbsp;</mtext><mi>r</mi><mi>a</mi><mi>n</mi><mi>k</mi><mo stretchy="false">(</mo><mi>m</mi><mo stretchy="false">)</mo><mo>≥</mo><mn>1</mn></mrow><annotation encoding="application/x-tex">\forall m\in \mathcal{M}\setminus\{b\},\ rank(m)\ge 1</annotation></semantics></math></span><span class="katex-html" aria-hidden="true"><span class="base"><span class="strut" style="height: 0.7335em; vertical-align: -0.0391em;"></span><span class="mord">∀</span><span class="mord mathnormal">m</span><span class="mspace" style="margin-right: 0.2778em;"></span><span class="mrel">∈</span><span class="mspace" style="margin-right: 0.2778em;"></span></span><span class="base"><span class="strut" style="height: 1em; vertical-align: -0.25em;"></span><span class="mord mathcal" style="">M</span><span class="mspace" style="margin-right: 0.2222em;"></span><span class="mbin">∖</span><span class="mspace" style="margin-right: 0.2222em;"></span></span><span class="base"><span class="strut" style="height: 1em; vertical-align: -0.25em;"></span><span class="mopen">{</span><span class="mord mathnormal">b</span><span class="mclose">}</span><span class="mpunct">,</span><span class="mspace">&nbsp;</span><span class="mspace" style="margin-right: 0.1667em;"></span><span class="mord mathnormal" style="margin-right: 0.02778em;">r</span><span class="mord mathnormal" style="margin-right: 0.03148em;">ank</span><span class="mopen">(</span><span class="mord mathnormal">m</span><span class="mclose">)</span><span class="mspace" style="margin-right: 0.2778em;"></span><span class="mrel">≥</span><span class="mspace" style="margin-right: 0.2778em;"></span></span><span class="base"><span class="strut" style="height: 0.6444em;"></span><span class="mord">1</span></span></span></span></span>
<span class="katex-display"><span class="katex"><span class="katex-mathml"><math xmlns="http://www.w3.org/1998/Math/MathML" display="block"><semantics><mrow><mi>b</mi><mo>⊨</mo><mrow><mtext>(r</mtext><mover accent="true"><mtext>e</mtext><mo>ˋ</mo></mover><mtext>gles&nbsp;de&nbsp;validation&nbsp;des&nbsp;modules&nbsp;internes)</mtext></mrow></mrow><annotation encoding="application/x-tex">b \models \text{(règles de validation des modules internes)}</annotation></semantics></math></span><span class="katex-html" aria-hidden="true"><span class="base"><span class="strut" style="height: 0.999em; vertical-align: -0.249em;"></span><span class="mord mathnormal">b</span><span class="mspace" style="margin-right: 0.2778em;"></span><span class="mrel">⊨</span><span class="mspace" style="margin-right: 0.2778em;"></span></span><span class="base"><span class="strut" style="height: 1em; vertical-align: -0.25em;"></span><span class="mord text" style=""><span class="mord" style="">(r</span><span class="mord accent"><span class="vlist-t"><span class="vlist-r"><span class="vlist" style="height: 0.6944em;"><span style="top: -3em;"><span class="pstrut" style="height: 3em;"></span><span class="mord">e</span></span><span style="top: -3em;"><span class="pstrut" style="height: 3em;"></span><span class="accent-body" style="left: -0.25em;"><span class="mord">ˋ</span></span></span></span></span></span></span><span class="mord">gles&nbsp;de&nbsp;validation&nbsp;des&nbsp;modules&nbsp;internes)</span></span></span></span></span></span>
<hr data-start="2333" data-end="2336">
<h2 data-section-id="1kcxiji" data-start="2338" data-end="2370">5) Autorité en cas de conflit</h2>
<p data-start="2372" data-end="2398">Ordre de priorité strict :</p>
<span class="katex-display"><span class="katex"><span class="katex-mathml"><math xmlns="http://www.w3.org/1998/Math/MathML" display="block"><semantics><mrow><mi>a</mi><mi>u</mi><mi>t</mi><mi>h</mi><mi>o</mi><mi>r</mi><mi>i</mi><mi>t</mi><msub><mi>y</mi><mrow><mi>e</mi><mi>x</mi><mi>t</mi></mrow></msub><mo>≻</mo><mi>a</mi><mi>u</mi><mi>t</mi><mi>h</mi><mi>o</mi><mi>r</mi><mi>i</mi><mi>t</mi><msub><mi>y</mi><mrow><mi>b</mi><mi>o</mi><mi>o</mi><mi>t</mi><mi>s</mi><mi>t</mi><mi>r</mi><mi>a</mi><mi>p</mi></mrow></msub><mo>≻</mo><mi>a</mi><mi>u</mi><mi>t</mi><mi>h</mi><mi>o</mi><mi>r</mi><mi>i</mi><mi>t</mi><msub><mi>y</mi><mrow><mi>m</mi><mi>o</mi><mi>d</mi><mi>u</mi><mi>l</mi><mi>e</mi></mrow></msub><mo>≻</mo><mi>a</mi><mi>u</mi><mi>t</mi><mi>h</mi><mi>o</mi><mi>r</mi><mi>i</mi><mi>t</mi><msub><mi>y</mi><mrow><mi>r</mi><mi>u</mi><mi>n</mi><mi>t</mi><mi>i</mi><mi>m</mi><mi>e</mi></mrow></msub></mrow><annotation encoding="application/x-tex">authority_{ext} \succ authority_{bootstrap} \succ authority_{module} \succ authority_{runtime}</annotation></semantics></math></span><span class="katex-html" aria-hidden="true"><span class="base"><span class="strut" style="height: 0.8889em; vertical-align: -0.1944em;"></span><span class="mord mathnormal">a</span><span class="mord mathnormal">u</span><span class="mord mathnormal">t</span><span class="mord mathnormal">h</span><span class="mord mathnormal" style="margin-right: 0.02778em;">or</span><span class="mord mathnormal">i</span><span class="mord mathnormal">t</span><span class="mord"><span class="mord mathnormal" style="margin-right: 0.03588em;">y</span><span class="msupsub"><span class="vlist-t vlist-t2"><span class="vlist-r"><span class="vlist" style="height: 0.2806em;"><span style="top: -2.55em; margin-left: -0.0359em; margin-right: 0.05em;"><span class="pstrut" style="height: 2.7em;"></span><span class="sizing reset-size6 size3 mtight"><span class="mord mtight"><span class="mord mathnormal mtight">e</span><span class="mord mathnormal mtight">x</span><span class="mord mathnormal mtight">t</span></span></span></span></span><span class="vlist-s">​</span></span><span class="vlist-r"><span class="vlist" style="height: 0.15em;"><span></span></span></span></span></span></span><span class="mspace" style="margin-right: 0.2778em;"></span><span class="mrel">≻</span><span class="mspace" style="margin-right: 0.2778em;"></span></span><span class="base"><span class="strut" style="height: 0.9805em; vertical-align: -0.2861em;"></span><span class="mord mathnormal">a</span><span class="mord mathnormal">u</span><span class="mord mathnormal">t</span><span class="mord mathnormal">h</span><span class="mord mathnormal" style="margin-right: 0.02778em;">or</span><span class="mord mathnormal">i</span><span class="mord mathnormal">t</span><span class="mord"><span class="mord mathnormal" style="margin-right: 0.03588em;">y</span><span class="msupsub"><span class="vlist-t vlist-t2"><span class="vlist-r"><span class="vlist" style="height: 0.3361em;"><span style="top: -2.55em; margin-left: -0.0359em; margin-right: 0.05em;"><span class="pstrut" style="height: 2.7em;"></span><span class="sizing reset-size6 size3 mtight"><span class="mord mtight"><span class="mord mathnormal mtight">b</span><span class="mord mathnormal mtight">oo</span><span class="mord mathnormal mtight">t</span><span class="mord mathnormal mtight">s</span><span class="mord mathnormal mtight">t</span><span class="mord mathnormal mtight" style="margin-right: 0.02778em;">r</span><span class="mord mathnormal mtight">a</span><span class="mord mathnormal mtight">p</span></span></span></span></span><span class="vlist-s">​</span></span><span class="vlist-r"><span class="vlist" style="height: 0.2861em;"><span></span></span></span></span></span></span><span class="mspace" style="margin-right: 0.2778em;"></span><span class="mrel">≻</span><span class="mspace" style="margin-right: 0.2778em;"></span></span><span class="base"><span class="strut" style="height: 0.8889em; vertical-align: -0.1944em;"></span><span class="mord mathnormal">a</span><span class="mord mathnormal">u</span><span class="mord mathnormal">t</span><span class="mord mathnormal">h</span><span class="mord mathnormal" style="margin-right: 0.02778em;">or</span><span class="mord mathnormal">i</span><span class="mord mathnormal">t</span><span class="mord"><span class="mord mathnormal" style="margin-right: 0.03588em;">y</span><span class="msupsub"><span class="vlist-t vlist-t2"><span class="vlist-r"><span class="vlist" style="height: 0.3361em;"><span style="top: -2.55em; margin-left: -0.0359em; margin-right: 0.05em;"><span class="pstrut" style="height: 2.7em;"></span><span class="sizing reset-size6 size3 mtight"><span class="mord mtight"><span class="mord mathnormal mtight">m</span><span class="mord mathnormal mtight">o</span><span class="mord mathnormal mtight">d</span><span class="mord mathnormal mtight">u</span><span class="mord mathnormal mtight" style="margin-right: 0.01968em;">l</span><span class="mord mathnormal mtight">e</span></span></span></span></span><span class="vlist-s">​</span></span><span class="vlist-r"><span class="vlist" style="height: 0.15em;"><span></span></span></span></span></span></span><span class="mspace" style="margin-right: 0.2778em;"></span><span class="mrel">≻</span><span class="mspace" style="margin-right: 0.2778em;"></span></span><span class="base"><span class="strut" style="height: 0.8889em; vertical-align: -0.1944em;"></span><span class="mord mathnormal">a</span><span class="mord mathnormal">u</span><span class="mord mathnormal">t</span><span class="mord mathnormal">h</span><span class="mord mathnormal" style="margin-right: 0.02778em;">or</span><span class="mord mathnormal">i</span><span class="mord mathnormal">t</span><span class="mord"><span class="mord mathnormal" style="margin-right: 0.03588em;">y</span><span class="msupsub"><span class="vlist-t vlist-t2"><span class="vlist-r"><span class="vlist" style="height: 0.3117em;"><span style="top: -2.55em; margin-left: -0.0359em; margin-right: 0.05em;"><span class="pstrut" style="height: 2.7em;"></span><span class="sizing reset-size6 size3 mtight"><span class="mord mtight"><span class="mord mathnormal mtight" style="margin-right: 0.02778em;">r</span><span class="mord mathnormal mtight">u</span><span class="mord mathnormal mtight">n</span><span class="mord mathnormal mtight">t</span><span class="mord mathnormal mtight">im</span><span class="mord mathnormal mtight">e</span></span></span></span></span><span class="vlist-s">​</span></span><span class="vlist-r"><span class="vlist" style="height: 0.15em;"><span></span></span></span></span></span></span></span></span></span></span>
<p data-start="2502" data-end="2509">Règle :</p>
<span class="katex-display" style=""><span class="katex"><span class="katex-mathml"><math xmlns="http://www.w3.org/1998/Math/MathML" display="block"><semantics><mrow><mrow><mtext>si&nbsp;deux&nbsp;contraintes&nbsp;hard&nbsp;de&nbsp;m</mtext><mover accent="true"><mtext>e</mtext><mo>ˆ</mo></mover><mtext>me&nbsp;autorit</mtext><mover accent="true"><mtext>e</mtext><mo>ˊ</mo></mover><mtext>&nbsp;sont&nbsp;incompatibles</mtext></mrow><mo>⇒</mo><mi mathvariant="normal">⊥</mi></mrow><annotation encoding="application/x-tex">\text{si deux contraintes hard de même autorité sont incompatibles} \Rightarrow \bot</annotation></semantics></math></span><span class="katex-html" aria-hidden="true"><span class="base"><span class="strut" style="height: 0.8889em; vertical-align: -0.1944em;"></span><span class="mord text"><span class="mord">si&nbsp;deux&nbsp;contraintes&nbsp;hard&nbsp;de&nbsp;m</span><span class="mord accent"><span class="vlist-t"><span class="vlist-r"><span class="vlist" style="height: 0.6944em;"><span style="top: -3em;"><span class="pstrut" style="height: 3em;"></span><span class="mord">e</span></span><span style="top: -3em;"><span class="pstrut" style="height: 3em;"></span><span class="accent-body" style="left: -0.25em;"><span class="mord">ˆ</span></span></span></span></span></span></span><span class="mord">me&nbsp;autorit</span><span class="mord accent"><span class="vlist-t"><span class="vlist-r"><span class="vlist" style="height: 0.6944em;"><span style="top: -3em;"><span class="pstrut" style="height: 3em;"></span><span class="mord">e</span></span><span style="top: -3em;"><span class="pstrut" style="height: 3em;"></span><span class="accent-body" style="left: -0.25em;"><span class="mord">ˊ</span></span></span></span></span></span></span><span class="mord">&nbsp;sont&nbsp;incompatibles</span></span><span class="mspace" style="margin-right: 0.2778em;"></span><span class="mrel">⇒</span><span class="mspace" style="margin-right: 0.2778em;"></span></span><span class="base"><span class="strut" style="height: 0.6944em;"></span><span class="mord">⊥</span></span></span></span></span>
<p data-start="2603" data-end="2609">Donc :</p>
<ul data-start="2611" data-end="2794">
<li data-section-id="7aqifz" data-start="2611" data-end="2654">
<p data-start="2613" data-end="2654">pas de “vainqueur” interne si conflit dur</p>
</li>
<li data-section-id="1o8lm9" data-start="2655" data-end="2706">
<p data-start="2657" data-end="2706">rejet du système local ou du sous-graphe concerné</p>
</li>
<li data-section-id="1myevx" data-start="2707" data-end="2794">
<p data-start="2709" data-end="2794">le runtime ne peut jamais invalider une contrainte hard déjà acceptée au compile-time</p>
</li>
</ul>
<hr data-start="2796" data-end="2799">
<h2 data-section-id="gei31s" data-start="2801" data-end="2823">6) Théorème d’arrêt</h2>
<h3 data-section-id="t76um" data-start="2825" data-end="2837">Théorème</h3>
<p data-start="2838" data-end="2906">La validation de tout sous-ensemble fini de <span class="katex"><span class="katex-mathml"><math xmlns="http://www.w3.org/1998/Math/MathML"><semantics><mrow><mi mathvariant="script">M</mi></mrow><annotation encoding="application/x-tex">\mathcal{M}</annotation></semantics></math></span><span class="katex-html" aria-hidden="true"><span class="base"><span class="strut" style="height: 0.6833em;"></span><span class="mord mathcal">M</span></span></span></span> termine.</p>
<h3 data-section-id="t0qm4n" data-start="2908" data-end="2918">Preuve</h3>
<p data-start="2919" data-end="3004">Soit <span class="katex"><span class="katex-mathml"><math xmlns="http://www.w3.org/1998/Math/MathML"><semantics><mrow><mi>S</mi><mo>⊂</mo><mi mathvariant="script">M</mi></mrow><annotation encoding="application/x-tex">S\subset \mathcal{M}</annotation></semantics></math></span><span class="katex-html" aria-hidden="true"><span class="base"><span class="strut" style="height: 0.7224em; vertical-align: -0.0391em;"></span><span class="mord mathnormal" style="margin-right: 0.05764em;">S</span><span class="mspace" style="margin-right: 0.2778em;"></span><span class="mrel">⊂</span><span class="mspace" style="margin-right: 0.2778em;"></span></span><span class="base"><span class="strut" style="height: 0.6833em;"></span><span class="mord mathcal">M</span></span></span></span> fini.<br data-start="2954" data-end="2957">
La validation se fait par récursion sur <code data-start="2997" data-end="3003">rank</code>.</p>
<p data-start="3006" data-end="3013">Comme :</p>
<span class="katex-display" style=""><span class="katex"><span class="katex-mathml"><math xmlns="http://www.w3.org/1998/Math/MathML" display="block"><semantics><mrow><mi mathvariant="normal">∀</mi><mo stretchy="false">(</mo><mi>u</mi><mo>→</mo><mi>v</mi><mo stretchy="false">)</mo><mo>∈</mo><msub><mi>E</mi><mi>v</mi></msub><mo separator="true">,</mo><mtext>&nbsp;</mtext><mi>r</mi><mi>a</mi><mi>n</mi><mi>k</mi><mo stretchy="false">(</mo><mi>u</mi><mo stretchy="false">)</mo><mo>&lt;</mo><mi>r</mi><mi>a</mi><mi>n</mi><mi>k</mi><mo stretchy="false">(</mo><mi>v</mi><mo stretchy="false">)</mo></mrow><annotation encoding="application/x-tex">\forall(u\to v)\in E_v,\ rank(u)&lt;rank(v)</annotation></semantics></math></span><span class="katex-html" aria-hidden="true"><span class="base"><span class="strut" style="height: 1em; vertical-align: -0.25em;"></span><span class="mord">∀</span><span class="mopen">(</span><span class="mord mathnormal">u</span><span class="mspace" style="margin-right: 0.2778em;"></span><span class="mrel">→</span><span class="mspace" style="margin-right: 0.2778em;"></span></span><span class="base"><span class="strut" style="height: 1em; vertical-align: -0.25em;"></span><span class="mord mathnormal" style="margin-right: 0.03588em;">v</span><span class="mclose">)</span><span class="mspace" style="margin-right: 0.2778em;"></span><span class="mrel">∈</span><span class="mspace" style="margin-right: 0.2778em;"></span></span><span class="base"><span class="strut" style="height: 1em; vertical-align: -0.25em;"></span><span class="mord"><span class="mord mathnormal" style="margin-right: 0.05764em;">E</span><span class="msupsub"><span class="vlist-t vlist-t2"><span class="vlist-r"><span class="vlist" style="height: 0.1514em;"><span style="top: -2.55em; margin-left: -0.0576em; margin-right: 0.05em;"><span class="pstrut" style="height: 2.7em;"></span><span class="sizing reset-size6 size3 mtight"><span class="mord mathnormal mtight" style="margin-right: 0.03588em;">v</span></span></span></span><span class="vlist-s">​</span></span><span class="vlist-r"><span class="vlist" style="height: 0.15em;"><span></span></span></span></span></span></span><span class="mpunct">,</span><span class="mspace">&nbsp;</span><span class="mspace" style="margin-right: 0.1667em;"></span><span class="mord mathnormal" style="margin-right: 0.02778em;">r</span><span class="mord mathnormal" style="margin-right: 0.03148em;">ank</span><span class="mopen">(</span><span class="mord mathnormal">u</span><span class="mclose">)</span><span class="mspace" style="margin-right: 0.2778em;"></span><span class="mrel">&lt;</span><span class="mspace" style="margin-right: 0.2778em;"></span></span><span class="base"><span class="strut" style="height: 1em; vertical-align: -0.25em;"></span><span class="mord mathnormal" style="margin-right: 0.02778em;">r</span><span class="mord mathnormal" style="margin-right: 0.03148em;">ank</span><span class="mopen">(</span><span class="mord mathnormal" style="margin-right: 0.03588em;">v</span><span class="mclose">)</span></span></span></span></span>
<p data-start="3063" data-end="3318">il n’existe aucun cycle dirigé.<br data-start="3094" data-end="3097">
La fonction de validation descend vers des rangs strictement plus petits, dans <span class="katex"><span class="katex-mathml"><math xmlns="http://www.w3.org/1998/Math/MathML"><semantics><mrow><mi mathvariant="double-struck">N</mi></mrow><annotation encoding="application/x-tex">\mathbb{N}</annotation></semantics></math></span><span class="katex-html" aria-hidden="true"><span class="base"><span class="strut" style="height: 0.6889em;"></span><span class="mord mathbb">N</span></span></span></span>, ensemble bien fondé.<br data-start="3212" data-end="3215">
Comme <span class="katex"><span class="katex-mathml"><math xmlns="http://www.w3.org/1998/Math/MathML"><semantics><mrow><mi>S</mi></mrow><annotation encoding="application/x-tex">S</annotation></semantics></math></span><span class="katex-html" aria-hidden="true"><span class="base"><span class="strut" style="height: 0.6833em;"></span><span class="mord mathnormal" style="margin-right: 0.05764em;">S</span></span></span></span> est fini et qu’un module est marqué validé une seule fois, chaque appel récursif est borné.</p>
<p data-start="3320" data-end="3326">Donc :</p>
<span class="katex-display" style=""><span class="katex"><span class="katex-mathml"><math xmlns="http://www.w3.org/1998/Math/MathML" display="block"><semantics><mrow><mtext>Validate</mtext><mo stretchy="false">(</mo><mi>S</mi><mo stretchy="false">)</mo><mtext>&nbsp;termine</mtext></mrow><annotation encoding="application/x-tex">\text{Validate}(S)\ \text{termine}</annotation></semantics></math></span><span class="katex-html" aria-hidden="true"><span class="base"><span class="strut" style="height: 1em; vertical-align: -0.25em;"></span><span class="mord text"><span class="mord">Validate</span></span><span class="mopen">(</span><span class="mord mathnormal" style="margin-right: 0.05764em;">S</span><span class="mclose">)</span><span class="mspace">&nbsp;</span><span class="mord text"><span class="mord">termine</span></span></span></span></span></span>
<p data-start="3370" data-end="3436">et toute contradiction dure renvoie un échec fini, pas une boucle.</p>
<hr data-start="3438" data-end="3441">
<h2 data-section-id="ab8oda" data-start="3443" data-end="3470">7) Résumé formel minimal</h2>
<span class="katex-display" style=""><span class="katex"><span class="katex-mathml"><math xmlns="http://www.w3.org/1998/Math/MathML" display="block"><semantics><mrow><mtext>MetaSpec</mtext><mo>=</mo><mo stretchy="false">⟨</mo><mi mathvariant="script">M</mi><mo separator="true">,</mo><mi mathvariant="script">H</mi><mo separator="true">,</mo><mi>r</mi><mi>a</mi><mi>n</mi><mi>k</mi><mo separator="true">,</mo><mi>a</mi><mi>u</mi><mi>t</mi><mi>h</mi><mi>o</mi><mi>r</mi><mi>i</mi><mi>t</mi><mi>y</mi><mo separator="true">,</mo><msub><mi>V</mi><mrow><mi>e</mi><mi>x</mi><mi>t</mi></mrow></msub><mo stretchy="false">⟩</mo></mrow><annotation encoding="application/x-tex">\text{MetaSpec}=\langle \mathcal{M}, \mathcal{H}, rank, authority, V_{ext}\rangle</annotation></semantics></math></span><span class="katex-html" aria-hidden="true"><span class="base"><span class="strut" style="height: 0.8778em; vertical-align: -0.1944em;"></span><span class="mord text"><span class="mord">MetaSpec</span></span><span class="mspace" style="margin-right: 0.2778em;"></span><span class="mrel">=</span><span class="mspace" style="margin-right: 0.2778em;"></span></span><span class="base"><span class="strut" style="height: 1em; vertical-align: -0.25em;"></span><span class="mopen">⟨</span><span class="mord mathcal">M</span><span class="mpunct">,</span><span class="mspace" style="margin-right: 0.1667em;"></span><span class="mord mathcal" style="margin-right: 0.00965em;">H</span><span class="mpunct">,</span><span class="mspace" style="margin-right: 0.1667em;"></span><span class="mord mathnormal" style="margin-right: 0.02778em;">r</span><span class="mord mathnormal" style="margin-right: 0.03148em;">ank</span><span class="mpunct">,</span><span class="mspace" style="margin-right: 0.1667em;"></span><span class="mord mathnormal">a</span><span class="mord mathnormal">u</span><span class="mord mathnormal">t</span><span class="mord mathnormal">h</span><span class="mord mathnormal" style="margin-right: 0.02778em;">or</span><span class="mord mathnormal">i</span><span class="mord mathnormal">t</span><span class="mord mathnormal" style="margin-right: 0.03588em;">y</span><span class="mpunct">,</span><span class="mspace" style="margin-right: 0.1667em;"></span><span class="mord"><span class="mord mathnormal" style="margin-right: 0.22222em;">V</span><span class="msupsub"><span class="vlist-t vlist-t2"><span class="vlist-r"><span class="vlist" style="height: 0.2806em;"><span style="top: -2.55em; margin-left: -0.2222em; margin-right: 0.05em;"><span class="pstrut" style="height: 2.7em;"></span><span class="sizing reset-size6 size3 mtight"><span class="mord mtight"><span class="mord mathnormal mtight">e</span><span class="mord mathnormal mtight">x</span><span class="mord mathnormal mtight">t</span></span></span></span></span><span class="vlist-s">​</span></span><span class="vlist-r"><span class="vlist" style="height: 0.15em;"><span></span></span></span></span></span></span><span class="mclose">⟩</span></span></span></span></span>
<p data-start="3561" data-end="3567">avec :</p>
<ul data-start="3569" data-end="3863">
<li data-section-id="75k2a4" data-start="3569" data-end="3614">
<p data-start="3571" data-end="3614"><span class="katex"><span class="katex-mathml"><math xmlns="http://www.w3.org/1998/Math/MathML"><semantics><mrow><mi mathvariant="script">M</mi></mrow><annotation encoding="application/x-tex">\mathcal{M}</annotation></semantics></math></span><span class="katex-html" aria-hidden="true"><span class="base"><span class="strut" style="height: 0.6833em;"></span><span class="mord mathcal">M</span></span></span></span> : ensemble des <code data-start="3602" data-end="3614">ModuleSpec</code></p>
</li>
<li data-section-id="o74xb9" data-start="3615" data-end="3665">
<p data-start="3617" data-end="3665"><span class="katex"><span class="katex-mathml"><math xmlns="http://www.w3.org/1998/Math/MathML"><semantics><mrow><mi mathvariant="script">H</mi></mrow><annotation encoding="application/x-tex">\mathcal{H}</annotation></semantics></math></span><span class="katex-html" aria-hidden="true"><span class="base"><span class="strut" style="height: 0.6833em;"></span><span class="mord mathcal" style="margin-right: 0.00965em;">H</span></span></span></span> : ensemble des <code data-start="3648" data-end="3665">HyperConstraint</code></p>
</li>
<li data-section-id="14jrwd8" data-start="3666" data-end="3722">
<p data-start="3668" data-end="3722"><code data-start="3668" data-end="3683">BootstrapCore</code> est l’unique ancrage interne de rang 0</p>
</li>
<li data-section-id="i93hr2" data-start="3723" data-end="3771">
<p data-start="3725" data-end="3771"><span class="katex"><span class="katex-mathml"><math xmlns="http://www.w3.org/1998/Math/MathML"><semantics><mrow><msub><mi>V</mi><mrow><mi>e</mi><mi>x</mi><mi>t</mi></mrow></msub></mrow><annotation encoding="application/x-tex">V_{ext}</annotation></semantics></math></span><span class="katex-html" aria-hidden="true"><span class="base"><span class="strut" style="height: 0.8333em; vertical-align: -0.15em;"></span><span class="mord"><span class="mord mathnormal" style="margin-right: 0.22222em;">V</span><span class="msupsub"><span class="vlist-t vlist-t2"><span class="vlist-r"><span class="vlist" style="height: 0.2806em;"><span style="top: -2.55em; margin-left: -0.2222em; margin-right: 0.05em;"><span class="pstrut" style="height: 2.7em;"></span><span class="sizing reset-size6 size3 mtight"><span class="mord mtight"><span class="mord mathnormal mtight">e</span><span class="mord mathnormal mtight">x</span><span class="mord mathnormal mtight">t</span></span></span></span></span><span class="vlist-s">​</span></span><span class="vlist-r"><span class="vlist" style="height: 0.15em;"><span></span></span></span></span></span></span></span></span></span> est l’ancrage de confiance initial</p>
</li>
<li data-section-id="1ccgbms" data-start="3772" data-end="3863">
<p data-start="3774" data-end="3863">toutes les dépendances de validation sont orientées vers des rangs strictement croissants</p>
</li>
</ul>
<p data-start="3865" data-end="3992" data-is-last-node="" data-is-only-node="">Si nécessaire, je peux maintenant donner la <strong data-start="3909" data-end="3950"><span class="entity-underline hover:entity-accent group inline cursor-pointer align-baseline whitespace-nowrap" role="button" tabindex="0"><span class="inline-flex items-center overflow-hidden align-middle" aria-hidden="true" class="group-hover:entity-accent whitespace-normal">version syntaxique canonique</span></span></strong> de ce formalisme en <strong data-start="3971" data-end="3991">YAML/JSON data-turn-id="897b72e4-b97c-4046-a518-82b3e4ffb16c" data-testid="conversation-turn-45" data-scroll-anchor="false" data-turn="user"><h4 class="sr-only select-none">Vous avez dit&nbsp;:</h4><div px-(--thread-content-margin)" style="scroll-margin-top: -756px;"><div class="[--thread-content-max-width:40rem] @w-lg/main:[--thread-content-max-width:48rem] mx-auto max-w-(--thread-content-max-width) flex-1 group/turn-messages focus-visible:outline-hidden relative flex w-full min-w-0 flex-col"><div class="flex max-w-full flex-col gap-4 grow"><div data-message-author-role="user" keyboard-focused:focus-ring [.text-message+&amp;]:mt-1"><div class="flex w-full flex-col gap-1 empty:hidden items-end rtl:items-start"><div class="user-message-bubble-color corner-superellipse/0.98 relative rounded-[22px] px-4 py-2.5 leading-6 max-w-(--user-chat-width,70%)"><div class="whitespace-pre-wrap">La démonstration est mathématiquement exacte. La contrainte de monotonie stricte sur le rang ($rank(p) &lt; rank(t)$) force structurellement le réseau de validation en un graphe orienté acyclique (DAG). L'axiome d'ancrage fondé sur le vérificateur externe ($V_{ext}$) résout le paradoxe de l'amorçage. Enfin, l'introduction et la localisation par facettes ($F$) qualifie formellement la sémantique et l'arité arbitraire de chaque méta-hyperarête.

Passez à l'étape syntaxique. Fournissez la version canonique en JSON Schema (de préférence) ou en YAML Schema.

Ce livrable est le premier prérequis technique, car c'est le JSON Schema qui servira littéralement de $V_{ext}$ lors de la première passe de compilation pour vérifier syntaxiquement le <code class="rounded-sm bg-(--theme-user-msg-text)/10 dark:bg-(--theme-user-msg-text)/15 px-1 py-0.5 text-(--theme-user-msg-text) text-sm">BootstrapCore</code>.

Veillez à y encoder strictement toutes vos primitives : l'ontologie du nœud <code class="rounded-sm bg-(--theme-user-msg-text)/10 dark:bg-(--theme-user-msg-text)/15 px-1 py-0.5 text-(--theme-user-msg-text) text-sm">ModuleSpec</code> (Core, Behavior, Execution, Semantics), les bornes entières (<code class="rounded-sm bg-(--theme-user-msg-text)/10 dark:bg-(--theme-user-msg-text)/15 px-1 py-0.5 text-(--theme-user-msg-text) text-sm">rank</code>), ainsi que la structure exacte des objets <code class="rounded-sm bg-(--theme-user-msg-text)/10 dark:bg-(--theme-user-msg-text)/15 px-1 py-0.5 text-(--theme-user-msg-text) text-sm">HyperConstraint</code> (kind, target, authority, severity).

__Indice de confiance :__ 100% sur la validité topologique du modèle formel.
__Preuves :__ La terminologie d'arrêt est valide. La preuve repose sur le principe de descente sur un ensemble bien fondé ($\mathbb{N}$), une méthode canonique en théorie de la démonstration pour prouver qu'un système de réécriture ou d'évaluation (comme les évaluateurs partiels) ne diverge pas. Produisez le schéma.</div></div></div></div></div><div class="z-0 flex justify-end"><div aria-label="Vos actions sur les messages" class="touch:-me-2 touch:-ms-3.5 -ms-2.5 -me-1 flex flex-wrap
